product.description:
1. Cetaphil Daily Moisturising Cream for Dry to Very Dry Skin: Instantly replenishes, intensely nourishes and soothes skin dryness for 48 hours
2. Clinically Proven to Restore Skin's Moisture Barrier in 1 Week: Binds water to the skin, preventing moisture loss to hydrate and protect skin from dryness
3. New and Improved Ingredient Blend: Now with hydrating glycerin and skin essential vitamin B3 (niacinamide) and pro-vitamin B5 (panthenol)
4. Developed for Even the Most Sensitive Skin: The hypoallergenic, non-comedogenic formula is fragrance free and paraben free
5. From the #1 Dermatologist Recommended Facial Skincare Brand
6. Defends Against 5 Signs of Skin Sensitivity: Dryness, irritation, roughness, tightness and a weakened skin barrier

metaData.Ingredients: Aqua, Glycerin, Petrolatum, Dicaprylyl Ether, Dimethicone, Glyceryl Stearate, Cetyl Alcohol, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Peg-30 Stearate, Panthenol, Niacinamide, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis Oil, Tocopherol, Tocopheryl Acetate, Pantolactone, Propylene Glycol, Bht, Disodium Edta, Benzyl Alcohol, Phenoxyethanol, Sodium Hydroxide, Citric Acid, Fi.1765.V01
metaData.Key Information: Care for your dry to very dry skin with CETAPHIL Moisturizing Cream, a non-greasy, moisture rich cream for the whole body. Enriched with sweet almond oil and vitamin E, it immediately comforts and instantly hydrates dry, sensitive skin. Formulated with a new blend of key ingredients: hydrating glycerin, panthenol (pro-vitamin B5) to hydrate, soothe and preserve the skin barrier, and niacinamide (vitamin B3) to help smooth skin’s texture and retain skin’s moisture barrier. For long lasting hydration, this extra strength moisturizer binds water to the skin to intensely replenish the skin's moisture and prevent moisture loss, hydrating and soothing skin's dryness for 48 hours and completely restoring the skin's moisture barrier in one week. Ideal for very dry areas of skin on the hands, feet, elbows and knees, leaving your skin feeling soft, smooth and nourished. This fragrance free, paraben free formula won't clog pores and is clinically tested for even the most gentle skin. Effectively defends against 5 signs of skin sensitivity.
metaData.Preparation: Smooth generously to hydrate and protect skin
metaData.Storage Information: For external use only. Store below 30°C

product.name: Physiogel Daily Moisture Therapy Body Lotion

offers.description: Buy 1 Physiogel Daily Moisture Therapy Body Lotion @ $43.40

parentCategory.name: Beauty & Personal Care
parentCategory.tagLine: Bath & body, hair care, facial wash & more

product.description:
The result of research carried out by the A-DERMA plant-based dermatological laboratory, this body lotion provides 24-hour hydration to fragile and delicate skin. In one step, it moisturizes, refreshes, and protects. Rich and effective like a classic moisturizing body lotion, it is non-sticky and lightweight, gliding onto the skin easily. Its thermo-sensitive formula immediately melts with body heat and absorbs quickly, leaving a dry feel that lets you get dressed quickly. This unique, comfortable texture has been well-received by users*. The skin is comforted, soft, supple, and pleasantly refreshed. With 91% natural ingredients, it does not contain controversial ingredients and has a very high tolerance.


Rhealba Oat, derived from farming.
Vegan info: no animal-derived ingredients.
*Use test on 66 women, regular users of Hydration Body Lotion purchased at a pharmacy/parapharmacy.

metaData.Ingredients: Water (Aqua). Glycerin. Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride. Isopropyl Palmitate. Propylene Glycol. C14-22 Alcohols. Dimethicone. Fragrance (Parfum). Avena Sativa (Oat) Kernel Extract (Avena Sativa Kernel Extract). Benzoic Acid. C12-20 Alkyl Glucoside. C20-22 Alcohols. C20-22 Alkyl Phosphate. Caprylyl Glycol. Hydroxyethyl Acrylate/Sodium Acryloyldimethyl Taurate Copolymer. Polysorbate 60. Sodium Hydroxide. Sorbitan Isostearate. Squalane. Xanthan Gum
metaData.Preparation: Apply all over the body every day.

product.name: A-Derma Body Lotion - Moisturising

metaData.Ingredients: Aqua (Water), Glycerin, Petrolatum, C12-15 Alkyl Benzoate, Cetearyl Alcohol, Ceteareth-20, Steareth-2, Dimethicone, Glyceryl Stearate, Methylparaben, Propylparaben, Dichlorobenzyl Alcohol, Polyacrylic Acid, Triethanolamine
metaData.Key Information:
QV Skin Lotion replenishes and soothes dry skin. For best results apply after your bath or shower.
• Helps seal in natural moisture by acting as a protective barrier.
• pH balanced, low-irritant formulation, free from fragrance, colour, lanolin and propylene glycol.
• Suitable for even sensitive skin types.
• Particularly suitable for infants and the elderly.
metaData.Preparation: Apply to affected areas as often as required, particularly after showering, bathing, shaving, exposure to harsh climatic conditions and at night.

metaData.Ingredients: Aqua (Water), Paraffinum Liquidum, Glycerin, Petrolatum, Cetearyl Alcohol, Dimethicone, Ceteareth-20, Stearic Acid, Squalane, Laureth-3, Glyceryl Stearate, Methylparaben, Dichlorobenzyl Alcohol
metaData.Key Information:
QV Cream is a highly concentrated moisturising cream for dry skin. It contains squalane, a natural component found in the skin’s oil. This rich protective cream replenishes the skin and dry areas. Areas prone to dryness like the elbows knees and hands will just love what QV Cream can do to help.
• Recommended for moisturising dry skin.
• Helps to seal in natural moisture by acting as a protective barrier.
• Helps protect against dryness.
• pH balanced, low-irritant formulation, free from fragrance, colour, lanolin and propylene glycol.
• Suitable for sensitive skin and flaking or itchiness due to dry skin conditions.
• Suitable for infants and the elderly.
metaData.Preparation: Apply to affected areas as often as required, particularly after washing, bathing, showering, shaving, exposure to harsh climatic conditions and at night.

metaData.Ingredients: Water, Glycerin, Butylene Glycol, Cetearyl Alcohol, Cetyl Alcohol, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Ceteareth-20, Dimethicone, Cyclopentasiloxane, Cetearyl Glucoside, Xylitylglucoside, Hydroxyacetophenone, Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Oil, Methyl Gluceth-20, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Anhydroxylitol, Sodium Polyacrylate, Xylitol, Fragrance, Titanium Dioxide, O-Cymen-5-Ol, Sodium Hyaluronate, Sodium Pca, Bha, Citrus Junos Fruit Extract (Yuzu Ceramide), Tocopherol (Vitamin E)
metaData.Key Information:
Soothes and hydrates dry and sensitive skin with a lightweight, non-greasy formula.

• 82% felt Instantly Moisturised after just 1 use
• Daily use lightweight formulation for optimal moisturisation & strengthening the skin barrier
• Restore your skin barrier with Yuzu Ceramide
• Retain moisture in your skin with Sodium Hyaluronate
• Replenish & nourish your skin with Aquaxyl Complex
• Fast absorption
• Free from Paraben, Lanolin and Phthalate
metaData.Preparation: Apply a thin film on the affected area as often as needed and massage gently into the skin. Use regularly for optimum hydration. Suitable for all age groups.
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool, dry place
